headline: Why The V2X (VVX) Story Is Shifting On Pipeline Prospects And Lingering Execution Risks
summary: Analysts have lifted their fair value estimate for V2X from US$67.83 to US$75.88, signaling an updated view on where they see the shares settling over time. This shift lines up with recent research that sounds generally constructive, pointing to a roughly US$60b qualified pipeline, strong win rates, and progress on de levering, even as firms still call out execution and concentration risks. As you read on, you will see how to track these changing assumptions and what they might mean for your...

headline: The Great Divide: Is Walmart the Ultimate Hedge for 2026?
summary: Walmart (NYSE: WMT) has quietly become one of the more compelling macro stories of 2026. Bank of America recently reinstated coverage with a Buy rating and a $150 price target, arguing the retailer is uniquely built to win in a bifurcated economy where higher earners keep spending and lower earners pull back hard. With shares ... The Great Divide: Is Walmart the Ultimate Hedge for 2026?

headline: Bank of America Announces Redemption of €1,750,000,000 Floating Rate Senior Notes, due March 10, 2027
summary: Bank of America Corporation announced today that it will redeem on March 10, 2026 all €1,750,000,000 principal amount outstanding of its Floating Rate Senior Notes, due March 10, 2027 (ISIN: XS3019213654; Common Code: 301921365) (the "Notes").
